hero.title1: Reliable Outdoor Furniture Supplier from Vietnam

intro.label: Who We Are
intro.paragraph1: We help retailers, distributors, and project buyers source reliable outdoor furniture Made in Vietnam , Binh Dinh Manufacturing Base — with stable quality, flexible production, and on-time delivery. From sample development to container loading, every step is controlled to meet international standards.
intro.paragraph2:
✔ Consistent quality with full QC control
✔ OEM / ODM customization for private labels
✔ Stable capacity up to 50,000 units/month
✔ On-time delivery with export-ready process
✔ Experienced with US, EU & global markets

seo.title: About Us — DHT Outdoor Furniture
seo.description: Learn about DHT Outdoor Furniture — 15+ years of furniture manufacturing excellence.

hero.title: Vietnam Outdoor Furniture Manufacturer
hero.subtitle: Acacia • Teak • Eucalyptus • Aluminum OEM / ODM • Mixed Container • Export Worldwide
hero.description: DHT is a Vietnam-based outdoor furniture supplier supporting retailers, distributors, and project buyers. We deliver stable quality, flexible production, and reliable export solutions for global partners.

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: From OEM to Global Brand
story.paragraph1: DHT started as an OEM manufacturer. As the market shifted, we decided to take control of our own export journey.
story.paragraph2: It was a challenging process: restructuring production, investing in technology, training our team, and learning to serve global customers.
story.paragraph3: Thanks to perseverance and over 30 years of experience, DHT now exports to more than 20 countries – from the US and Australia to across Europe. "We don't just sell wood – we deliver a story of Vietnamese resilience."

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Strict control from raw material to finished product.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear pricing policy, transparent progress reporting.

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.desc: Long-term partnership and support for customers.

items.title: Factory Expansion
items.desc: Expanded factories, invested in CNC, UV coating lines, and wood kilns.

items.title: Global Reach
items.desc: Achieved FSC and BSCI certifications, expanded into the US, EU, and Australian markets.

items.title: Strategic Partnerships
items.desc: Aiming to become a strategic partner of international retail chains.

john.quote: DHT has been, is, and will continue striving to deliver greater value to our customers, building lasting trust and carrying the pride of Vietnamese craftsmanship from Quy Nhon to the world.

tyler.quote: At DHT, we don't just build outdoor furniture — we craft spaces where people connect, share stories, and create lasting memories.

dylan.quote: Every project we deliver carries the promise of precision, durability, and the Vietnamese craftsmanship that defines DHT.

david.quote: Innovation means blending timeless teak with modern design to create furniture that stands strong under any sky.

alicia.quote: Strong finances fuel strong partnerships. At DHT, we ensure every order is backed by trust, transparency, and sustainable growth.

stats.heading: Production Figures & Capacity
stats.subtitle: Equipped with state-of-the-art machinery and an expansive 80,000m² facility, we ensure scalability, precision, and reliable fulfillment for global markets.

hr.heading: Human Resources & R&D
hr.prodWorkers: 250 production workers dedicated to consistent quality.
hr.rndModels: 40–50 new models being developed yearly by our R&D team.
